data.title: RBN Rewards introduces Rewarded Rate™ for home buyers via participating agents, aiming at lower mortgage rates.
data.description: Recently launched by RBN Rewards in New York on January 22, 2026, Rewarded Rate™ is an innovative feature within their real estate rewards platform. This initiative aims to transform the process of buying or selling a home into a source of lasting financial and lifestyle advantages. RBN Rewards is a leading global platform in the real estate sector, offering unique benefits to its users. This new addition highlights their commitment to providing unparalleled opportunities in the market.

data.title: DOT price could hit $2.48 by January 2026. Currently at $1.91, the RSI is at 41.86 with bearish MACD.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polkadot is currently valued at $1.91, and financial analysts anticipate it to reach a resistance level of $2.48 by the end of the month. Technical analysis reveals a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 41.86, while the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicator shows bearish momentum, leading to conflicting signals for DOT's short-term performance.

data.title: Intel Corp (INTC) to report Q4 earnings on Jan 22. Analysts expect $0.04/share, down from $0.13/share last year. Expected revenue $13.39B vs $14.26B last year. Intel has beaten revenue estimates in 5 out of the last 8 quarters. Shares gained 11.7% to close at $54.25.
data.description: Intel Corporation (INTC) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings on Jan. 22 after market close. Analysts predict earnings of 4 cents per share, a decrease from 13 cents per share in the same period last year. Revenue is expected to be around $13.39 billion, down from $14.26 billion a year ago. Intel has exceeded revenue expectations in five consecutive quarters and in eight out of the last 10 quarters. The company's shares closed at $54.25, marking an 11.7% increase, on Wednesday. For more detailed information, readers can find the full story on the latest analyst ratings on Benzinga Pro.

data.title: Central Holidays announces 2027 Sordevolo Product Line with La Passione di Cristo, offering new travel opportunities.
data.description: Moonachie, New Jersey, on January 22, 2026 - Central Holidays, a leading travel company known for its affordable-luxury travel offerings, has introduced its highly anticipated 2027 Sordevolo Product Line. This new line features immersive travel experiences and customized travel programs. This launch exemplifies the company's dedication to providing unique and high-quality travel options to its customers.

data.title: Valicor partners with Ramsey Education to bring financial education to second high school in underserved community, expanding from Cincinnati to Michigan.
data.description: Valicor Environmental Services ("Valicor") has extended its partnership with Ramsey Education from Cincinnati to Michigan, to provide students with vital money management skills. This initiative, announced on Jan. 22, 2026, in Monroe, Ohio, signifies a significant expansion in the company's efforts to promote financial literacy.

data.title: CPSC warns to stop using infant self-feeding pillows to prevent serious injury or death from aspiration and suffocation.
data.description: The U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) issued a warning on Jan. 22, 2026, urging consumers to discontinue using infant self-feeding pillows. These products are being flagged as they secure the bottle in a dangerous position, potentially hindering the infant's movement. The CPSC stresses the importance of halting the use of these pillows to avoid any risks.

data.title: Inflation increased by 2.8% through Nov 2025, signaling persistent price rises. Fed's preferred gauge was delayed due to govt shutdown.
data.description: Inflation data for the months of October and November, which are the Federal Reserve's favored indicators, was recently published following a delay caused by the government shutdown.

data.title: North Korean hackers exposed by Fireblocks in fake crypto job scam targeting developers with malware. #cybersecurity #scam #LazarusGroup
data.description: Fireblocks security team recently uncovered a recruitment scam linked to the Lazarus Group targeting cryptocurrency developers. The scam involved malware disguised as coding assignments to entice developers. This sophisticated scheme aimed to compromise developers' systems and potentially steal valuable information. The Fireblocks team's swift action disrupted the scam and prevented further attacks. This incident underscores the ongoing threats faced by developers in the crypto space, highlighting the importance of cybersecurity measures. It is crucial for all individuals involved in cryptocurrency to remain vigilant and take proactive steps to protect their systems and data.

data.title: Sturgis Ambulance workers in South Dakota ratify first union contract with Teamsters Local 120 after winning big.
data.description: In Sturgis, South Dakota, on January 22, 2026, emergency health workers achieved a significant victory with the approval of their initial collective bargaining agreement through Teamsters Local 120. The agreement, spanning two years, marks a milestone for workers at Sturgis Ambulance. Key provisions in the agreement were endorsed by the employees, signifying a positive step for the workers' rights and well-being.

data.title: Global radiopharmaceuticals market will reach $11.66 Bn by 2029 with CAGR of 8.0%, from $6.76 Bn in 2022 - Valuates Reports.
data.description: In Bangalore, India, as of January 22, 2026, the global radiopharmaceuticals market was reported to have reached a revenue of USD 6761 million in 2022. Projections indicate that this market is expected to experience significant growth, with an anticipated readjusted size of USD 11660 million by 2029. The compound annual growth rate (CAGR) during the forecast period from 2023 to 2029 is estimated to be 8.0%.

data.title: eDreams ODIGEO speeds up AI innovation, 30% of code generated by AI. Launches autonomous agentic systems for bookings, customer support.
data.description: In Barcelona, Spain, eDreams ODIGEO, a prominent travel subscription platform (BME: EDR) (OTC: EDDRF), referred to as 'the Company' or 'eDO,' shared news of a significant enhancement in its artificial intelligence tools. They have successfully implemented autonomous agentic systems capable of conducting bookings independently and providing voice-supported customer service. This innovation sets them apart from standard conversational AI systems that typically focus on search results.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Vistagen investors from Apr 1, 2024 to Dec 16, 2025. Contact James Wilson for details.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors affected by Vistagen to reach out to him directly to explore their potential options. If you bought or obtained securities in Vistagen during the period from April 1, 2024, to December 16, 2025, and are interested in having a conversation about your situation, please get in touch with Mr. Wilson.
